# Silver Sage Media

> Publishing and media company based in the Pacific Northwest. Parent brand of Silver Sage Books (American West fiction and nonfiction), Operation Granny Files (genealogy education), Emery County Encyclopedia (Utah local history), Greg Maxfield Author (fiction), and Conduital (productivity software and AI strategy).

Silver Sage Media, LLC is an independent publishing and media company founded by Greg Maxfield, based in Camas, Washington. The company publishes books, digital content, and educational resources across multiple brands, united by a commitment to storytelling rooted in the American West and the preservation of histories that matter.

## Properties
- [Operation Granny Files](https://operationgrannyfiles.com): Genealogy education and family history research guides
- [Emery County Encyclopedia](https://emeryencyclopedia.com): Comprehensive local history encyclopedia of Emery County, Utah
- [Greg Maxfield Author](https://gregmaxfield.com): Author platform — fiction, nonfiction, and serial storytelling
- [Conduital](https://conduital.com): Productivity software and AI strategy consulting for creative businesses and knowledge workers

## About
- [About Silver Sage Media](https://silversagemedia.com/about): Company background, founder Greg Maxfield, and publishing philosophy
- [Silver Sage Books Catalog](https://silversagemedia.com/books): Fiction and nonfiction titles published by Silver Sage Books
